h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to skeptically probe the physical evidence for climate-scale claims.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: bothering that standard in a useful way
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to seek a concrete method to distinguish between tightening and steering.
The learner will continue to incrementally reconcile the conflict between the visual map projection and the actual area measurements.

scored.recoheredEarlier: My instinct still wants the dashboard to say what probably happened to this patient
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I think “probably” is where I keep smuggling the dashboard into the case, sorry.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to struggle with and defend their instinct to use the dashboard's average to estimate what probably happened to the patient.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Okay, the steel is not the bridge; the route is the bridge
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to continue tracing the load path and waiting for the physical demonstration to prove resonance.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Okay, so the poster should say bacteria become resistant, not the patient.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to ask for clarification on the distinction between existing resistance and mutation during treatment.
